title: Device for fluids level control
abstract: The invention relates to a simple and versatile device that is very useful to control the level of the fluids in different enclosers, possible to be used in private households as well in offices, medical consulting rooms, head quarters of companies, or in any enclosers were there is a neccessity to control the level of different polluting substances. The device consists of a floating cap (1) provided with a guidance element (2) and with a ring (3) rigidly fixed on the floating cap (1) whose size is calculated so to be smaller or at most equal with the level (4) of the liquid whose level is intended to be controled, all these being made of an expanded material with a low specific weight.
claims: Claims CLAIM Method for fliuds level control, wherein, it consists of a floating cap 1 provided with a guidance element 2 and with a ring 3 rigidly fixed on the floating cap 1 whose size is calculated so to be smaller or at most equal with the level 4 of the liquid whose level is intended to be controled, all these being made of an expanded material with a low specific weight.
